languages.text: "Наряженные люди с Даргонуса приходили ко мне и предлагали стать покровителями 32-го полка. Что мне с ними делать?"
languages.translation_comment: Игрок посетил Даргонус после появления на борту Батошски

languages.text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"
languages.original_text: "Наряженные люди с Даргонуса приходили ко мне и предлагали стать покровителями 32-го полка. Что мне с ними делать?"

traits.locale_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"
"Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

"Dargonus is more dangerous to me than Zarkov ever was. Political predators closing in around me, hoping to sink their teeth into my throat and become the patrons of the 32nd. What am I supposed to do? I can't blow their brains out — you wouldn't like it."
"Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"
"Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

languages.text: 「ザルコフよりも危険なドラゴンナス。政治的な獲物を狙う者たちが、私の首を噛みつき、32番目のオーナーになることを望んでいる。私はどうすればいいのか。彼らの脳を吹き飛ばすことはできない。君も喜ばないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Dargonus is more dangerous to me than Zarkov ever was. Political predators closing in around me, hoping to sink their teeth into my throat and become the patrons of the 32nd. What am I supposed to do? I can't blow their brains out — you wouldn't like it."

languages.text: "Dargonus'tan süslü püslü giyinimli insanlar geldi, 32. Alay'ın hamisi olmayı teklif ediyorlar. Ne yapmalıyım?"
languages.original_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus'tan süslü püslü giyinimli insanlar geldi, 32. Alay'ın hamisi olmayı teklif ediyorlar. Ne yapmalıyım?"

languages.text: “达戈努斯来了些衣着考究的人，表示想成为第32团的庇护人。我该如何应付他们？”
languages.original_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

traits.locale_text: “达戈努斯来了些衣着考究的人，表示想成为第32团的庇护人。我该如何应付他们？”

languages.text: "Einige seltsam gekleidete Leute aus Dargonus sind aufgetaucht und bieten an, Schirmherren des 32. Regiments zu werden. Wie soll ich mit ihnen verfahren?"
languages.original_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

traits.locale_text: "Einige seltsam gekleidete Leute aus Dargonus sind aufgetaucht und bieten an, Schirmherren des 32. Regiments zu werden. Wie soll ich mit ihnen verfahren?"

languages.text: « Des gens de Dragonus ont débarqué avec leurs beaux habits pour nous proposer de devenir les mécènes du 32e régiment. Qu'est-ce que je suis censé faire ? »
languages.original_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

traits.locale_text: « Des gens de Dragonus ont débarqué avec leurs beaux habits pour nous proposer de devenir les mécènes du 32e régiment. Qu'est-ce que je suis censé faire ? »

languages.text: «Han llegado unas personas de Dargonus con ropa elegante para ofrecer su patrocinio para el 32.º regimiento. ¿Qué debería decirles?».
languages.original_text: "Some fancy-dressed people from Dargonus showed up, offering to become patrons of the 32nd Regiment. How should I handle them?"

traits.locale_text: «Han llegado unas personas de Dargonus con ropa elegante para ofrecer su patrocinio para el 32.º regimiento. ¿Qué debería decirles?».

languages.translation_comment: Игрок посетил Даргонус после появления на борту Батошски
